title: The Fourth Tenant
hook: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map.

villain.displayName: The Landlord of Rooms That Move
villain.worldview: People accept impossible rooms when paperwork feels safe.
villain.motive: Turn players into custodians of hidden occupancy.

arcs.title: Contact and Contradiction
arcs.summary: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.

arcs.title: Interference and Doubt
arcs.summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.

arcs.title: Confrontation and Reckoning
arcs.summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.

beats.title: Unlisted Unit
beats.narrative: An email receipt references Unit 4 despite floor plans showing only three apartments.

incomingMessages.text: An email receipt references Unit 4 despite floor plans showing only three apartments. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.
Cross-reference this before dawn: Lease chain checksum.

incomingMessages.senderName: The Landlord of Rooms That Move
incomingMessages.text: You checked every floor except the one you carry inside. (Peripheral Presence)

responseOptions.label: Audit property records and insurance filings
responseOptions.summary: Choice 1: Audit property records and insurance filings

responseOptions.label: Follow the night tenant's movement logs immediately
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Follow the night tenant's movement logs immediately

beats.title: Trust Fracture
beats.narrative: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies.

incomingMessages.text: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.

incomingMessages.senderName: The Landlord of Rooms That Move
incomingMessages.text: Don't trust the woman in red by the stairwell. (Psychological Contact)

responseOptions.label: Trust Building Superintendent Leda Price and secure witness

responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Trust Lease Broker Owen Pike and expose internal leak

beats.title: Ultimatum Window
beats.narrative: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts.

incomingMessages.text: A timed message threatens collateral harm unless the party diverts. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.

incomingMessages.senderName: The Landlord of Rooms That Move
incomingMessages.text: Tell the police and she loses the door forever. (Active Interference)

responseOptions.label: Divert to save threatened NPC

responseOptions.label: Continue forensic pursuit under threat
responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Continue forensic pursuit under threat

beats.title: Confrontation Protocol
beats.narrative: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse.

incomingMessages.text: Players reconstruct motive and false trails before collapse. Maintain chain-of-custody and keep your channel open.

incomingMessages.text: Confess one lie and I return one life. (Personal Confrontation)

responseOptions.label: Commit to formal accusation and expose evidence chain

responseOptions.summary: Choice 2: Take private contact route for hidden confession

beats.narrative: Final scoring resolves ending branch and season continuity flags.

incomingMessages.text: Confess one lie and I return one life. (Personal Confrontation)

responseOptions.label: Proceed with controlled pressure
responseOptions.summary: Advance investigation while preserving evidence discipline.

endings.title: Clean Resolution
endings.summary: You prove the tenant scheme and secure testimony before records vanish.
endings.epilogue: Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.
endings.sequelHook: A tagged evidence box points to the next case.

endings.title: Compromised Truth
endings.summary: You expose fraud, but a key tenant disappears from all records.
endings.epilogue: The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.
endings.sequelHook: A surviving witness asks for help in a linked disappearance.

endings.title: Corruption Pact
endings.summary: You accept ownership of Unit 4 and rewrite occupancy history.
endings.epilogue: You keep control of the case, and the villain keeps control of you.
endings.sequelHook: Season continuity marks the player as compromised.

nodes.label: The Landlord of Rooms That Move
nodes.summary: Primary antagonist operating through layered identities.

nodes.label: Night Tenant Maris Holt
nodes.summary: Possible accomplice with motive and access.

timeline.summary: Witness account conflicts with archive records.
Villain contact shifts to direct intimidation.

playerBriefing.recruitmentReason: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map. Your pattern-recognition profile flagged a match with prior unresolved incidents.
playerBriefing.openingIncident: An email receipt references Unit 4 despite floor plans showing only three apartments.
playerBriefing.personalStakes: The Landlord of Rooms That Move has fixated on The player detective profile. If the case stalls, collateral witnesses remain exposed.
playerBriefing.firstDirective: Contact and Contradiction: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies. Maintain evidence discipline and document every stalking marker.

weeks.label: Week 1 - Recruitment And Baseline
weeks.objective: An email receipt references Unit 4 despite floor plans showing only three apartments.
keyMoments: The case opens with impossible evidence and uncertain allies.

weeks.label: Week 2 - Contradiction Mapping
weeks.objective: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.

weeks.label: Week 3 - Escalation Window
weeks.objective: Run live interventions while antagonist pressure rises and trust fractures.
keyMoments: Expose fraud publicly vs close case quietly

weeks.label: Week 4 - Endgame And Debrief
weeks.objective: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.
keyMoments: Liminal resident sustained by contractual ritual
Other cities report rent receipts tied to non-existent units.

npcDossiers.notableSecret: Building Superintendent Leda Price can expose the-fourth-tenant-clue-pressure at high trust.
Lease Broker Owen Pike can expose the-fourth-tenant-clue-reveal at high trust.
Night Tenant Maris Holt can expose the-fourth-tenant-clue-origin at high trust.
Claims Adjuster Felix Noor can expose the-fourth-tenant-clue-pressure at high trust.

communityPuzzles.title: Lease Fragment Reconstruction
communityPuzzles.objective: Assemble split lease clauses distributed by channel to locate Unit 4 entrance.

shards.content: Host receives a redacted PDF with clause numbering intact.
Ally A receives the missing clause text over WhatsApp.
Global drop contains watermark coordinates for the hidden hallway.

communityPuzzles.failureConsequence: The villain captures your partial decode and reroutes the final branch.
